query:
INSERT INTO operation (
                    operation_id,
                    kind,
                    data,
                    created_at,
                    scheduled_at,
                    retries
                )
                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                ON CONFLICT (operation_id) DO UPDATE SET
                    kind = excluded.kind,
                    data = excluded.data,
                    created_at = excluded.created_at,
                    scheduled_at = excluded.scheduled_at,
                    retries = excluded.retries
